name: getModeState for active drawing detection
description: Terra Draw getModeState() returns 'drawing' when user is mid-draw (incomplete geometry). Use this to guard tool switches and Escape-cancel. Switching to select mode via setMode('select') discards incomplete geometry.

content: Local SnapshotFeature type for terra-draw's GeoJSONStoreFeatures must use 'id?: string | number | undefined' (optional + explicit undefined) AND 'properties: Record<string, unknown>' (required) to be structurally assignable from GeoJSONStoreFeatures under exactOptionalPropertyTypes. Non-null-assert '.id!' is safe at call sites because terra-draw assigns an id on every finish event.
